title: Textoria amamiensis
taxonomy: Textoria amamiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to the Ryukyu Islands in Japan. The classification of Textoria amamiensis is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Magnoliids, order Magnoliales, family Annonaceae, genus Textoria. The genus Textoria belongs to the family Annonaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as custard apples. Further classification of Textoria amamiensis is needed for a more precise understanding of its botanical position within the plant kingdom.
